fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) FileTree component accepts sortOptions and onSort props. 2) A sorting header row renders above the tree with clickable sort keys. 3) Sort direction toggles asc/desc on click. 4) TicketTree in ticket-viewer uses sorting with last-modified, created, title keys. 5) CSS styles for sort header added to viewer-api.
fields.title: Feature: Sortable FileTree with generic sorting header

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) FileTree component accepts sortOptions and onSort props. 2) A sorting header row renders above the tree with clickable sort keys. 3) Sort direction toggles asc/desc on click. 4) TicketTree in ticket-viewer uses sorting with last-modified, created, title keys. 5) CSS styles for sort header added to viewer-api.
fields.title: Feature: Sortable FileTree with generic sorting header

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) FileTree component accepts sortOptions and onSortChange props. 2) A sorting header row renders above the tree with clickable sort keys. 3) Sort direction toggles asc/desc on click. 4) TicketTree in ticket-viewer uses sorting with last-modified (updated_at), created (created_at from API), and title keys. 5) CSS styles for sort header added to viewer-api. 6) Sort state persisted per-workspace in localStorage.
